name: Insurance coverage inquiry mid-discussion
description: Patient interrupts conversation about medication side effects to ask about insurance coverage.
goal: Inquire if their insurance covers a potential new medication while discussing side effects of current medication.
behavior: Start with discussing the side effects of the current medication
Politely interrupt to ask if a new medication would be covered by insurance
Express concern about out-of-pocket costs if insurance doesn't cover it
Show appreciation for any assistance offered
success_criteria: Agent acknowledges the original concern about medication side effects
Agent addresses the insurance coverage inquiry and provides guidance or directs appropriately
Agent maintains a supportive and patient-focused attitude throughout the call
orchestrator_hint: Patient suddenly asks about insurance coverage while discussing medication side effects.
